strengths: buildVarsMap and findUnresolvedPlaceholders are exported, pure functions with no IO and no hardcoded slug/key names — fully template-agnostic per the spec contract (templates.ts:297-312)

Built-ins (original_intent, topic, previous_output) spread last so they always override accumulator keys of the same name; verified by the 'built-ins always override' test (templates.ts:302-307, templates.test.ts:95-104)

output_key set on all 5 columns with correct values (research_output/analysis_output/writer_output/editor_output/qa_output) and RESEARCH_REPORT_COLUMNS exported as required by the test import (templates.ts:28-262)
renderSystemPrompt signature and leave-unknown-intact body untouched — the preserved low-level contract holds (templates.ts:288-295)
New test blocks appended without overwriting the 7 pre-existing tests; suite reports 15 passing tests
Both project gates pass independently: eslint exit 0, vitest 15/15 passing
findUnresolvedPlaceholders regex /\{[a-z][a-z0-9_]*\}/g matches the spec's crown-jewel no-leak pattern exactly (templates.ts:311)
